## Identity

The feud spiral's closing link — and its own opening act, since the ban
renews itself yearly, a self-loop nobody in House Quorwyn ever thought to
question out loud. It CAUSES the next raid, which CAUSES the next
burning, which CAUSES this ban again, forever, or at least until someone
gets bored of the eels.
